tEn: GQA: Training Generalized Multi-Query Transformer Models from Multi-Head Checkpoints
tZh: GQA：从多头检查点训练通用多查询Transformer模型
sEn: Uptraining multi-head checkpoints to grouped-query attention achieves near multi-head quality with MQA-like speed.
sZh: 通过微调将多头检查点转换为分组查询注意力，可在接近多头质量的同时获得类似多查询注意力的速度。
absEn: Multi-query attention (MQA), which only uses a single key-value head, drastically speeds up decoder inference. However, MQA can lead to quality degradation, and moreover it may not be desirable to train a separate model just for faster inference. We (1) propose a recipe for uptraining existing multi-head language model checkpoints into models with MQA using 5% of original pre-training compute, and (2) introduce grouped-query attention (GQA), a generalization of multi-query attention which uses an intermediate (more than one, less than number of query heads) number of key-value heads. We show that uptrained GQA achieves quality close to multi-head attention with comparable speed to MQA.
absZh: 多查询注意力（MQA）仅使用单个键值头，大幅加速了解码器推理。然而，MQA可能导致质量下降，而且仅为加速推理而单独训练模型可能并不理想。我们（1）提出了一种方法，利用原始预训练计算的5%将现有的多头语言模型检查点微调为具有MQA的模型；（2）引入了分组查询注意力（GQA），这是多查询注意力的一种泛化，使用中间数量（多于一个，少于查询头数）的键值头。我们表明，微调后的GQA在质量上接近多头注意力，同时速度与MQA相当。

contrib.en: Proposes a recipe to uptrain multi-head language model checkpoints into multi-query attention models using only 5% of original pre-training compute.
contrib.zh: 提出一种方法，仅用原始预训练算力的5%将多头语言模型检查点升级为多查询注意力模型。

contrib.en: Introduces grouped-query attention (GQA), a generalization of multi-query attention with an intermediate number of key-value heads.
contrib.zh: 引入分组查询注意力（GQA），这是多查询注意力的一种泛化，使用中间数量的键值头。

contrib.en: Shows that uptrained GQA achieves quality close to multi-head attention while being almost as fast as multi-query attention.
contrib.zh: 表明升级后的GQA在质量上接近多头注意力，同时速度几乎与多查询注意力相当。

contrib.en: Demonstrates that mean-pooling key and value heads works better than other conversion methods for uptraining.
contrib.zh: 证明在升级训练中，对键头和值头进行均值池化比其他转换方法效果更好。

contrib.en: Provides empirical evaluation on summarization, translation, and question answering tasks.
contrib.zh: 在摘要、翻译和问答任务上提供实证评估。

contrib.en: Discusses the trade-off between quality and inference speed for large language models.
contrib.zh: 讨论大型语言模型在质量和推理速度之间的权衡。

limits.en: Evaluation relies on Rouge score for summarization, which is a flawed metric.
limits.zh: 摘要评估依赖Rouge分数，该指标存在缺陷。

limits.en: Does not compare XXL GQA model to a model trained from scratch due to limited computation.
limits.zh: 由于算力限制，未将XXL GQA模型与从头训练的模型进行比较。

limits.en: Only evaluates on encoder-decoder models, not decoder-only models.
limits.zh: 仅在编码器-解码器模型上评估，未涉及仅解码器模型。

limits.en: The quality trade-off may not generalize to longer sequences or other tasks.
limits.zh: 质量权衡可能无法推广到更长序列或其他任务。

limits.en: Uptraining recipe may not be optimal for all model architectures or sizes.
limits.zh: 升级训练方法可能并非对所有模型架构或规模最优。

items.en: Multi-query attention (MQA), which only uses a single key-value head, drastically speeds up decoder inference. However, MQA can lead to quality degradation, and moreover it may not be desirable to train a separate model just for faster inference. We (1) propose a recipe for uptraining existing multi-head language model checkpoints into models with MQA using 5% of original pre-training compute, and (2) introduce grouped-query attention (GQA), a generalization of multi-query attention which uses an intermediate (more than one, less than number of query heads) number of key-value heads. We show that uptrained GQA achieves quality close to multi-head attention with comparable speed to MQA.
items.zh: 多查询注意力（MQA）仅使用单个键值头，大幅加速了解码器推理。然而，MQA可能导致质量下降，而且为加速推理单独训练一个模型可能并不理想。我们（1）提出了一种方法，利用原始预训练算力的5%将现有的多头语言模型检查点升级为MQA模型；（2）引入了分组查询注意力（GQA），这是多查询注意力的一种泛化，使用中间数量（多于一个，少于查询头数量）的键值头。我们证明，升级后的GQA在质量上接近多头注意力，同时速度与MQA相当。

items.en: Autoregressive decoder inference is a severe bottleneck for Transformer models due to the memory bandwidth overhead from loading decoder weights and all attention keys and values at every decoding step (Shazeer, 2019; Pope et al., 2022; de Jong et al., 2022). The memory bandwidth from loading keys and values can be sharply reduced through multi-query attention (Shazeer, 2019), which uses multiple query heads but single key and value heads.
items.zh: 由于在每个解码步骤加载解码器权重以及所有注意力键和值的内存带宽开销，自回归解码器推理成为Transformer模型的严重瓶颈（Shazeer, 2019; Pope et al., 2022; de Jong et al., 2022）。通过多查询注意力（Shazeer, 2019），可以大幅减少加载键和值的内存带宽，该方法使用多个查询头但单个键和值头。

items.en: However, multi-query attention (MQA) can lead to quality degradation and training instability, and it may not be feasible to train separate models optimized for quality and inference. Moreover, while some language models already use multi-query attention, such as PaLM (Chowdhery et al., 2022), many do not, including publicly available language models such as T5 (Raffel et al., 2020) and LLaMA (Touvron et al., 2023).
items.zh: 然而，多查询注意力（MQA）可能导致质量下降和训练不稳定，并且为质量和推理分别训练优化模型可能不可行。此外，虽然一些语言模型已经使用多查询注意力，如PaLM（Chowdhery et al., 2022），但许多模型并未使用，包括公开可用的语言模型如T5（Raffel et al., 2020）和LLaMA（Touvron et al., 2023）。

items.en: This work contains two contributions for faster inference with large language models. First, we show that language model checkpoints with multi-head attention (MHA) can be uptrained (Komatsuzaki et al., 2022) to use MQA with a small fraction of original training compute. This presents a cost-effective method to obtain fast multi-query as well as high-quality MHA checkpoints.
items.zh: 本文包含两项贡献，旨在加速大型语言模型的推理。首先，我们展示了具有多头注意力（MHA）的语言模型检查点可以通过少量原始训练算力升级（Komatsuzaki et al., 2022）为使用MQA。这提供了一种经济有效的方法来获得快速的多查询以及高质量的多头注意力检查点。

items.en: Second, we propose grouped-query attention (GQA), an interpolation between multi-head and multi-query attention with single key and value heads per subgroup of query heads. We show that uptrained GQA achieves quality close to multi-head attention while being almost as fast as multi-query attention.
items.zh: 其次，我们提出了分组查询注意力（GQA），这是多头注意力和多查询注意力之间的插值，每个查询头子组共享单个键和值头。我们证明，升级后的GQA在质量上接近多头注意力，同时速度几乎与多查询注意力一样快。

items.en: Generating a multi-query model from a multi-head model takes place in two steps: first, converting the checkpoint, and second, additional pre-training to allow the model to adapt to its new structure. Figure 1 shows the process for converting a multi-head checkpoint into a multi-query checkpoint. The projection matrices for key and value heads are mean pooled into single projection matrices, which we find works better than selecting a single key and value head or randomly initializing new key and value heads from scratch.
items.zh: 从多头模型生成多查询模型分为两步：首先，转换检查点；其次，进行额外的预训练以使模型适应其新结构。图1展示了将多头检查点转换为多查询检查点的过程。键和值头的投影矩阵通过均值池化合并为单个投影矩阵，我们发现这比选择单个键和值头或从头随机初始化新的键和值头效果更好。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Overview of conversion from multi-head to multi-query attention. Key and value projection matrices from all heads are mean pooled into a single head.
items.capZh: 图1：从多头注意力到多查询注意力的转换概览。所有头的键和值投影矩阵通过均值池化合并为单个头。

items.en: The converted checkpoint is then pre-trained for a small proportion α𝛼\alpha of its original training steps on the same pre-training recipe.
items.zh: 然后，转换后的检查点在相同的预训练方案下，以原始训练步数的一小部分比例α进行预训练。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Overview of grouped-query method. Multi-head attention has H query, key, and value heads. Multi-query attention shares single key and value heads across all query heads. Grouped-query attention instead shares single key and value heads for each group of query heads, interpolating between multi-head and multi-query attention.
items.capZh: 图2：分组查询方法概览。多头注意力有H个查询、键和值头。多查询注意力在所有查询头之间共享单个键和值头。分组查询注意力则为每组查询头共享单个键和值头，在多头注意力和多查询注意力之间进行插值。

items.en: Grouped-query attention divides query heads into G𝐺G groups, each of which shares a single key head and value head. GQA-g refers to grouped-query with G𝐺G groups. GQA-111, with a single group and therefore single key and value head, is equivalent to MQA, while GQA-h, with groups equal to number of heads, is equivalent to MHA. Figure 2 shows a comparison of grouped-query attention and multi-head/multi-query attention. When converting a multi-head checkpoint to a GQA checkpoint, we construct each group key and value head by mean-pooling all the original heads within that group.
items.zh: 分组查询注意力将查询头分为G组，每组共享一个键头和一个值头。GQA-g指具有G组的分组查询。GQA-1（单组，因此单个键和值头）等同于MQA，而GQA-h（组数等于头数）等同于MHA。图2展示了分组查询注意力与多头/多查询注意力的比较。当将多头检查点转换为GQA检查点时，我们通过均值池化该组内所有原始头来构造每个组的键和值头。

items.en: An intermediate number of groups leads to an interpolated model that is higher quality than MQA but faster than MHA, and, as we will show, represents a favorable trade-off. Going from MHA to MQA reduces H𝐻H key and value heads to a single key and value head, reducing the size of the key-value cache and therefore amount of data that needs to be loaded by a factor of H𝐻H. However, larger models generally scale the number of heads, such that multi-query attention represents a more aggressive cut in both memory bandwidth and capacity. GQA lets us keep the same proportional decrease in bandwidth and capacity as model size increases.
items.zh: 中间数量的组产生一个插值模型，其质量高于MQA但速度快于MHA，并且正如我们将展示的，代表了一个有利的权衡。从MHA到MQA将H个键和值头减少为单个键和值头，将键值缓存的大小以及因此需要加载的数据量减少了H倍。然而，较大的模型通常缩放头的数量，使得多查询注意力在内存带宽和容量方面都代表更激进的削减。GQA允许我们在模型规模增加时保持带宽和容量的相同比例下降。

items.en: Moreover, larger models suffer relatively less from memory bandwidth overhead from attention, as the KV-cache scales with model dimension while model FLOPs and parameters scale with the square of model dimension. Finally, standard sharding for large models replicates the single key and value head by the number of model partitions (Pope et al., 2022); GQA removes the waste from such partitioning. Therefore, we expect GQA to present a particularly good trade-off for larger models.
items.zh: 此外，较大的模型相对较少受到注意力内存带宽开销的影响，因为KV缓存随模型维度缩放，而模型FLOPs和参数随模型维度的平方缩放。最后，大型模型的标准分片通过模型分区数复制单个键和值头（Pope et al., 2022）；GQA消除了这种分片带来的浪费。因此，我们期望GQA为较大的模型提供特别好的权衡。

items.en: We note that GQA is not applied to the encoder self-attention layers; encoder representations are computed in parallel, and memory bandwidth is therefore generally not the primary bottleneck.
items.zh: 我们注意到GQA不应用于编码器自注意力层；编码器表示是并行计算的，因此内存带宽通常不是主要瓶颈。

items.en: All models are based on the T5.1.1 architecture (Raffel et al., 2020), implemented with JAX (Bradbury et al., 2018), Flax (Heek et al., 2020), and Flaxformer111https://github.com/google/flaxformer. For our main experiments we consider T5 Large and XXL with multi-head attention, as well as uptrained versions of T5 XXL with multi-query and grouped-query attention. We use the Adafactor optimizer with the same hyperparameters and learning rate schedule as T5 (Raffel et al., 2020). We apply MQA and GQA to decoder self-attention and cross-attention, but not encoder self-attention.
items.zh: 所有模型基于T5.1.1架构（Raffel et al., 2020），使用JAX（Bradbury et al., 2018）、Flax（Heek et al., 2020）和Flaxformer实现。在我们的主要实验中，我们考虑了具有多头注意力的T5 Large和XXL，以及具有多查询和分组查询注意力的T5 XXL升级版本。我们使用与T5相同的超参数和学习率调度（Raffel et al., 2020）的Adafactor优化器。我们将MQA和GQA应用于解码器自注意力和交叉注意力，但不应用于编码器自注意力。

items.en: Uptrained models are initialized from public T5.1.1 checkpoints. The key and value heads are mean-pooled to the appropriate MQA or GQA structure, and then pre-trained for a further α𝛼\alpha proportion of original pre-training steps with the original pre-training setup and dataset from (Raffel et al., 2020). For α=0.05𝛼0.05\alpha=0.05, training took approximately 600 TPUv3 chip-days.
items.zh: 升级模型从公开的T5.1.1检查点初始化。键和值头通过均值池化到适当的MQA或GQA结构，然后使用原始预训练设置和数据集（Raffel et al., 2020）进行额外α比例的预训练步数。对于α=0.05，训练大约需要600 TPUv3芯片天。

items.en: We evaluate on summarization datasets CNN/Daily Mail (Nallapati et al., 2016), arXiv and PubMed (Cohan et al., 2018), MediaSum (Zhu et al., 2021), and Multi-News (Fabbri et al., 2019); translation dataset WMT 2014 English-to-German; and question answering dataset TriviaQA (Joshi et al., 2017). We do not evaluate on popular classification benchmarks such as GLUE (Wang et al., 2019) as autoregressive inference is less applicable for those tasks.
items.zh: 我们在摘要数据集CNN/Daily Mail（Nallapati et al., 2016）、arXiv和PubMed（Cohan et al., 2018）、MediaSum（Zhu et al., 2021）和Multi-News（Fabbri et al., 2019）；翻译数据集WMT 2014英德；以及问答数据集TriviaQA（Joshi et al., 2017）上进行评估。我们不评估流行的分类基准如GLUE（Wang et al., 2019），因为自回归推理对这些任务不太适用。

items.en: For fine-tuning, we use a constant learning rate of 0.001, batch size 128, and dropout rate 0.1 for all tasks. CNN/Daily Mail and WMT use input length of 512 and output length 256. Other summarization datasets use input length 2048 and output length 512. Finally, TriviaQA uses input length 2048 and output length 32. We train until convergence and select the checkpoint with the highest dev performance. We use greedy decoding for inference.
items.zh: 对于微调，我们对所有任务使用恒定学习率0.001、批量大小128和丢弃率0.1。CNN/Daily Mail和WMT使用输入长度512和输出长度256。其他摘要数据集使用输入长度2048和输出长度512。最后，TriviaQA使用输入长度2048和输出长度32。我们训练至收敛，并选择开发集性能最高的检查点。推理时使用贪心解码。

items.en: We report time per sample per TPUv4 chip, as measured by xprof (Google, 2020). For timing experiments we use 8 TPUs with the largest batch size that fits up to 32 per TPU, and parallelization optimized separately for each model.
items.zh: 我们报告每个TPUv4芯片每个样本的时间，由xprof（Google, 2020）测量。对于计时实验，我们使用8个TPU，每个TPU最大批量大小32，并分别为每个模型优化并行化。

items.en: This section presents experiments to investigate the effect of different modeling choices. We evaluate performance on a representive subsample of tasks: CNN/Daily Mail, (short-form summarization), MultiNews (long-form summarization), and TriviaQA (question-answering).
items.zh: 本节介绍实验以研究不同建模选择的影响。我们在代表性任务子集上评估性能：CNN/Daily Mail（短文本摘要）、MultiNews（长文本摘要）和TriviaQA（问答）。

items.en: This work is focused on achieving a better trade-off between decoder quality and inference time through reducing the memory bandwidth overhead (Williams et al., 2009) from loading keys and values. Shazeer (2019) first proposed reducing this overhead through multi-query attention. Follow-up work showed that multi-query attention is especially helpful for long inputs (Pope et al., 2022; de Jong et al., 2022). Rabe (2023) independently developed GQA with public implementation. Other works have explored grouping attention heads for computational efficiency (Park et al., 2020; Luo et al., 2022; Ni et al., 2023) without focusing specifically on key-value heads, which determine memory bandwidth overhead.
items.zh: 本文致力于通过减少加载键和值的内存带宽开销（Williams et al., 2009）来实现解码器质量和推理时间之间更好的权衡。Shazeer（2019）首次提出通过多查询注意力减少这种开销。后续工作表明，多查询注意力对长输入尤其有帮助（Pope et al., 2022; de Jong et al., 2022）。Rabe（2023）独立开发了GQA并提供了公开实现。其他工作探索了为计算效率分组注意力头（Park et al., 2020; Luo et al., 2022; Ni et al., 2023），但没有特别关注决定内存带宽开销的键值头。

items.en: A number of other methods have been proposed to reduce memory bandwidth overhead from keys and values, as well as parameters. Flash attention (Dao et al., 2022) structures the attention computation to avoid materializing the quadratic attention scores, reducing memory and speeding up training. Quantization (Dettmers et al., 2022; Frantar et al., 2022) reduces the size of weights and activations, including keys and values, by lowering precision. Model distillation (Hinton et al., 2015; Gou et al., 2021) instead reduces model size at a given precision, using data generated from the larger model to finetune the smaller model. Layer-sparse cross-attention (de Jong et al., 2022) eliminates most cross-attention layers which make up the primary expense for longer inputs. Speculative sampling (Chen et al., 2023; Leviathan et al., 2022) ameliorates the memory bandwidth bottleneck by proposing multiple tokens with a smaller model which are then scored in parallel by a larger model.
items.zh: 已提出多种其他方法来减少键值以及参数的内存带宽开销。Flash注意力机制（Dao等人，2022）通过结构化注意力计算，避免生成二次注意力分数，从而减少内存并加速训练。量化（Dettmers等人，2022；Frantar等人，2022）通过降低精度来减小权重和激活值（包括键和值）的尺寸。模型蒸馏（Hinton等人，2015；Gou等人，2021）则在给定精度下减小模型尺寸，利用大模型生成的数据微调小模型。层稀疏交叉注意力（de Jong等人，2022）消除了大部分交叉注意力层，这些层是长输入的主要开销。推测性采样（Chen等人，2023；Leviathan等人，2022）通过小模型提出多个词元，再由大模型并行评分，从而缓解内存带宽瓶颈。

items.en: Finally, the uptraining procedure we propose is inspired by Komatsuzaki et al. (2022), which uptrains standard T5 checkpoints into sparsely activated Mixture-of-Experts models.
items.zh: 最后，我们提出的升级训练过程受Komatsuzaki等人（2022）启发，他们将标准T5检查点升级训练为稀疏激活的混合专家模型。

items.en: Language models are expensive for inference primarily due to the memory bandwidth overhead from loading keys and values. Multi-query attention reduces this overhead at the cost of decreased model capacity and quality. We propose to convert multi-head attention models to multi-query models with a small fraction of original pre-training compute. Moreover, we introduce grouped-query attention, an interpolation of multi-query and multi-head attention that achieves quality close to multi-head at comparable speed to multi-query attention.
items.zh: 语言模型在推理时成本高昂，主要原因是加载键值对带来的内存带宽开销。多查询注意力以降低模型容量和质量为代价减少了这一开销。我们提出将多头注意力模型转换为多查询模型，仅需原始预训练算力的一小部分。此外，我们引入了分组查询注意力，这是多查询注意力和多头注意力的插值，在速度与多查询注意力相当的情况下，实现了接近多头注意力的质量。

items.en: This paper focuses on ameliorating the memory bandwidth overhead from loading keys and values. This overhead is most important when generating longer sequences, for which quality is inherently difficult to evaluate. For summarization we employ Rouge score, which we know is a flawed evaluation that does not tell the whole story; for that reason, it is difficult to be certain our trade-offs are correct. Due to limited computation, we also do not compare our XXL GQA model to a comparitive model trained from scratch, so we do not know the relative performance of uptraining vs training from scratch. Finally, we evaluate the impact of uptraining and GQA only on encoder-decoder models. Recently, decoder-only models are extremely popular, and since these models do not have separate self-attention and cross-attention, we expect GQA to have a stronger advantage over MQA.
items.zh: 本文聚焦于缓解加载键值对带来的内存带宽开销。这一开销在生成长序列时最为显著，而长序列的质量本身难以评估。对于摘要任务，我们使用Rouge分数，但已知该评估存在缺陷，无法全面反映情况；因此，我们难以确定权衡是否正确。由于算力有限，我们未将XXL GQA模型与从头训练的对比模型进行比较，因此无法得知升级训练与从头训练的相对性能。最后，我们仅在编码器-解码器模型上评估了升级训练和GQA的影响。近期，仅解码器模型极为流行，由于这些模型没有独立的自注意力和交叉注意力，我们预计GQA相比MQA具有更大优势。

items.en: We thank Santiago Ontañón, Afroz Mohiuddin, William Cohen and others at Google Research for insightful advice and discussion.
items.zh: 感谢Santiago Ontañón、Afroz Mohiuddin、William Cohen以及Google Research的其他同事提供的富有洞见的建议和讨论。
